description: arXiv:2607.07753v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Modelling psychological disorders in artificial agents offers a testbed for computational psychiatry and a lens on affective-control failure modes. Prior work induces one or two disorders by hand-tuned reward shaping, labels the behaviour post hoc, and reports single runs. We recast disorder modelling as dose-controllable manipulation of...
